title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at AIF Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at AIF Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the AIF Holdings Services family as a Teacher in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AIF Holdings Services:
AIF Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
